_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Into the message input (data-testid "message-input") type the text: bash: printf '\033[1G\033[1G\033[1GDev code has changes not yet deployed' and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for a completed tool call (data-testid "tool-call-completed") to appear, then click the bash tool header (".bash-tool-header") to expand the details panel (".bash-tool-details" should become visible). The output area (the last ".bash-tool-code" element) should contain the readable text "Dev code has changes not yet deployed" and must NOT contain the stray fragment "GGG" or the raw escape fragment "[1G".

steps.value: bash: printf '\033[1G\033[1G\033[1GDev code has changes not yet deployed'

steps.expression: (() => { const els = document.querySelectorAll('.bash-tool-code'); const last = els[els.length - 1]; return last ? last.textContent : 'NOT FOUND'; })()
steps.expect: Dev code has changes not yet deployed

steps.expression: (() => { const els = document.querySelectorAll('.bash-tool-code'); const last = els[els.length - 1]; return last ? last.textContent.includes('GGG') : false; })()
(() => { const els = document.querySelectorAll('.bash-tool-code'); const last = els[els.length - 1]; return last ? last.textContent.includes('[1G') : false; })()
